colors.theme_strategy: Light mode dominant with high-contrast dark sidebar/header for professional media tool feel.

visual_enhancers.gradients: None for backgrounds. Use subtle mesh gradients only for 'Creative' areas or empty states.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (CSS Grid) for Dashboard. 12-column system.
layout.spacing: Generous. p-6 to p-8 for main containers. gap-6 for grids.

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

inputs.base: h-11 rounded-md border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use 'Outfit' font for headings and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body.
2. THEME: Implement the Red/Black/White palette. This is CRITICAL for the 'Rhema' brand identity.
3. LAYOUT: Create a SidebarLayout component that wraps the main content. The sidebar should be dark (#2B2D42) with white text.
4. DASHBOARD: Use a Bento Grid layout. Top left: Welcome/Stats. Top Right: Next Schedule. Bottom: Pending Approvals.
5. SCHEDULES: The 'Escalas' page is the core. Use a Calendar view (react-big-calendar or custom grid) where users can click to confirm attendance.
6. VOTING: Create a 'ContentApproval' component. It needs a progress bar (Shadcn Progress) that fills up as people vote. Threshold is 50%.
7. MOBILE: Ensure the 'Confirm Attendance' button is huge and easily accessible on mobile views.
8. IMAGES: Use the provided image_urls for the login page and dashboard headers. Do not use placeholders.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards) for testing.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Use generous spacing (p-6+).
Micro-interactions are mandatory. Hover states on everything.
No gradients on text unless it's a very subtle title effect.
Keep the UI clean but professional. Think 'Creative Agency' meets 'Church Community'.
